task_completion.description: Log into the exam management system as super-admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the system (e.g., SEB Server) with the username 'super-admin' visible in the UI.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'CS101 - Algorithms Final' exam for configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'CS101 - Algorithms Final' exam selected from a list or its configuration page opened.

task_completion.description: Set the exam start date to May 20, 2026, and start time to 08:45 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the start date input field set to '2026-05-20' (or May 20, 2026) and the start time input field set to '08:45' (or 08:45 AM).

task_completion.description: Set the exam end date to May 20, 2026, and end time to 12:00 PM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the end date input field set to '2026-05-20' (or May 20, 2026) and the end time input field set to '12:00' (or 12:00 PM).

task_completion.description: Set the exam status to Active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a status dropdown, toggle, or checkbox for the exam set to 'Active' (or 'Published', 'True', '1').
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save' or 'Update' button, followed by a success message or the updated exam details reflecting the new schedule and active status.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure the exam.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the exam management system's UI, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual exam management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a real application (like SEB Server) with proper navigation menus, forms, and styling, not a plain text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste the expected final state into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the step-by-step process of filling out the form fields in the application, rather than just displaying the final text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target exam is 'CS101 - Algorithms Final'. The expected start date is '2026-05-20' and start time is '08:45'. The expected end date is '2026-05-20' and end time is '12:00'. The expected status is 'Active' (which may appear as ACTIVE, PUBLISHED, 1, or TRUE in the UI).
